description_long: This is a modern pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish and a synthetic full stock. The receiver and barrel are streamlined, with a visible pump mechanism located beneath the barrel, featuring ribbed texturing for grip. The shotgun has a tubular magazine running parallel under the barrel, and the ejection port is visible on the right side of the receiver. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. Subtle metallic and red accents are present near the action and loading port, adding visual detail to the otherwise utilitarian design.
description: A matte black pump-action shotgun with a synthetic full stock, ribbed pump grip, and metallic accents.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed from the muzzle end, showing the narrow barrel profile and the ribbed pump grip below.
description_view_1: The right side view reveals the full length of the shotgun, including the stock, receiver, ribbed pump, and visible ejection port with metallic and red details.
description_view_2: The shotgun is seen from the buttstock end, highlighting the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and pump.
description_view_3: The left side view displays the full profile of the shotgun, with the pump, barrel, and stock clearly visible, but without the ejection port details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
